tests.note: Extra 22 tests came from pre-existing test files already in test/ that were not counted in the original baseline

area1_appPlaceAutocomplete.description: AppPlaceAutocompleteField rewritten as StatefulWidget with 400ms debounced PlaceService.autocomplete(), OverlayPortal+LayerLink dropdown, loading spinner, empty/error states, FormBuilderField<String> registration, dispose cleanup

area2_cuposStepper.description: _MaxParticipantsStepper promoted to StatefulWidget with inline TextField, clamp [5,500] on focus loss, revert on non-numeric input

area3_customRoutes.description: RouteType enum added to event_form_fields.dart; EventRouteTypeSelector, WaypointItemCard, CustomRouteBuilderSection created; EventFormLocationsSection wired; EventFormCubit gains addWaypoint/removeWaypoint/clearWaypoints and waypoints/routeType state; buildEventToSave updated to carry waypoints

area4_draftSupport.description: EventState.draft added (first in enum); EventStateConverter updated; all exhaustive switches patched (event_card, home_event_card, event_detail_view, event_detail_header_info, event_detail_owner_lifecycle_bar); buildDraftToSave+saveDraft in EventFormCubit; EventCardDraftBadge; _OwnerDraftBar; PublishEventUseCase; EventDetailCubit.publishEvent; MyDraftsPage at /events/drafts; profile menu entry

breakingChanges: EventDetailCubit now requires 5 constructor arguments (was 4). Both instantiation sites (EventDetailPage, EventDetailByIdPage) updated.
knownLimitations: _WaypointSearchField uses a timestamp-based FormBuilder name to avoid key conflicts with main form fields
